variant_id.description: The ID of the variant. Required in the /PUT or /POST request if the product has variants.

product_id.description: The ID of the product. Required in a /POST request.

weight.description: The weight is displayed here if the item has a custom dimension.

height.description: The height is displayed here if the item has a custom dimension.

width.description: The width is displayed here if the item has a custom dimension.

depth.description: The depth is displayed here if the item has a custom dimension.

quantity.description: Quantity of this item in the cart.

is_taxable.description: Boolean value that specifies whether the item is taxable.

image_url.description: Image of the product or variant.

items.title: Applied Discount

code.description: The coupon code. Required in a /POST request.

name.description: Name given to the coupon in the control panel.

discountType.description:
The discount type.
- type 0: per_item_discount
- type 1: percentage_discount
- type 2: per_total_discount
- type 3: shipping_discount
- type 4: free_shipping

discountAmount.description: The amount of the discount based on the coupon. For example, 3 percent off will show a 3.

expiresDate.description: Returns 0 if no expiration date has been set.

totalDiscount.description: The total amount of all discounts applied to the cart.

discount_amount.description: The total value of all discounts applied to this item. This includes coupons and cart-level discounts.

coupon_amount.description: The total value of all coupons applied to this item.

original_price.description: An item’s original price is the same as the product default price in the admin panel.

list_price.description: The net item price before discounts and coupons are applied. BigCommerce derives an item’s list price from the product default price or, if applicable, the sale price configured in the admin panel.

sale_price.description: Price of the item after all discounts are applied. (The final price before tax calculation.)

extended_list_price.description: List price of the item multiplied by the quantity.

extended_sale_price.description: Sale price of the item multiplied by the quantity.

options.description: The list of selected options for this product.

name.description: The product option name; for example, Color or Size.

value.description: The product option value; for example, Red or Medium.

valueId.description: The product option value identifier in number format.

gift_wrapping.description: The gift wrapping details for this item.
